summary: Border Patrol anniversary video set to music with fast cuts, mixing black and white archival imagery with modern footage. It opens on a black and white photo of an agent beside a museum text card, cuts to color footage of agents climbing onto an armored vehicle, then high-contrast black and white slow motion of a masked agent in multicam (a 'CZ15' patch), an entry team with blurred faces at a door, and ends on a 'U.S. BORDER PATROL 101 YEAR ANNIVERSARY' title card.

script.scene: Vintage black and white photo of a Border Patrol agent in an old-style uniform and campaign hat in front of a museum display; overlaid white text card reads 'AN ANCIENT [...] STILL USED [...] BORDER PATROL [...] IN MODERN LAW ENFORCEMENT'.
Color footage of an agent in a green uniform and beret climbing onto a tan armored vehicle near a bridge and water.
High-contrast black and white slow motion of a masked agent in a helmet with a night-vision mount, a balaclava and a multicam plate carrier (a 'CZ15' patch visible) standing in an open field.
An entry team in camo with blurred faces stacked against a dark interior door.
Black title card with a yellow circular 'U.S. BORDER PATROL' shield logo and red and white text '101 YEAR ANNIVE[RSARY]'.

notable_text: AN ANCIENT [...] STILL USED [...] BORDER PATROL [...] IN MODERN LAW ENFORCEMENT
tweet: On Border Patrol's 101st anniversary, we honor and thank all who've worn the uniform. A nation without borders is no nation at all.
